positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for pos_problem.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for pos_problem.tptp
1. is_in(picuris_mountains,new_mexico) | is_in(picuris_mountains,texas) [input(axiom)]
2. visited(juan_de_onate,picuris_mountains) [input(axiom)]
3. has_mine(picuris_mountains,harding_pegmatite_mine) & donated(harding_pegmatite_mine) [input(axiom)]
4. ~? [X0,X1] : (is_mountain_range(X0) & is_in(X0,texas) & has_mine(X0,X1) & donated(X1)) [input(axiom)]
5. is_mountain_range(picuris_mountains) [input(axiom)]
6. ? [X0] : (is_mountain_range(X0) & is_in(X0,new_mexico) & visited(juan_de_onate,X0)) [input(conjecture)]
7. ~? [X0] : (is_mountain_range(X0) & is_in(X0,new_mexico) & visited(juan_de_onate,X0)) [negated conjecture 6]
8. ! [X0,X1] : (~is_mountain_range(X0) | ~is_in(X0,texas) | ~has_mine(X0,X1) | ~donated(X1)) [ennf transformation 4]
9. ! [X0] : (~is_mountain_range(X0) | ~is_in(X0,new_mexico) | ~visited(juan_de_onate,X0)) [ennf transformation 7]
10. is_in(picuris_mountains,new_mexico) | is_in(picuris_mountains,texas) [cnf transformation 1]
11. visited(juan_de_onate,picuris_mountains) [cnf transformation 2]
12. donated(harding_pegmatite_mine) [cnf transformation 3]
13. has_mine(picuris_mountains,harding_pegmatite_mine) [cnf transformation 3]
14. ~has_mine(X0,X1) | ~is_in(X0,texas) | ~is_mountain_range(X0) | ~donated(X1) [cnf transformation 8]
15. is_mountain_range(picuris_mountains) [cnf transformation 5]
16. ~visited(juan_de_onate,X0) | ~is_in(X0,new_mexico) | ~is_mountain_range(X0) [cnf transformation 9]
18. 1 <=> is_in(picuris_mountains,texas) [avatar definition]
20. is_in(picuris_mountains,texas) <- (1) [avatar component clause 18]
22. 2 <=> is_in(picuris_mountains,new_mexico) [avatar definition]
24. is_in(picuris_mountains,new_mexico) <- (2) [avatar component clause 22]
25. 1 | 2 [avatar split clause 10,22,18]
26. ~is_in(picuris_mountains,new_mexico) | ~is_mountain_range(picuris_mountains) [resolution 11,16]
27. ~is_mountain_range(picuris_mountains) <- (2) [forward subsumption resolution 26,24]
28. $false <- (2) [forward subsumption resolution 27,15]
29. ~2 [avatar contradiction clause 28]
30. ~is_in(picuris_mountains,texas) | ~is_mountain_range(picuris_mountains) | ~donated(harding_pegmatite_mine) [resolution 14,13]
31. ~is_mountain_range(picuris_mountains) | ~donated(harding_pegmatite_mine) <- (1) [forward subsumption resolution 30,20]
32. ~donated(harding_pegmatite_mine) <- (1) [forward subsumption resolution 31,15]
33. $false <- (1) [forward subsumption resolution 32,12]
34. ~1 [avatar contradiction clause 33]
s1. 1 | 2 [sat_conversion 25]
s2. ~2 [sat_conversion 29]
s3. ~1 [sat_conversion 34]
s4. # [rat s1,s2,s3]
35. $false [avatar sat refutation s4]
% SZS output end Proof for pos_problem.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for neg_problem.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u23,axiom,
    ~is_in(picuris_mountains,texas)).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    is_in(picuris_mountains,new_mexico)).

cnf(u20,negated_conjecture,
    is_mountain_range(sK0)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    donated(harding_pegmatite_mine)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~has_mine(X0,X1) | ~is_in(X0,texas) | ~is_mountain_range(X0) | ~donated(X1)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    has_mine(picuris_mountains,harding_pegmatite_mine)).

cnf(u19,negated_conjecture,
    is_in(sK0,new_mexico)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    is_mountain_range(picuris_mountains)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define visited(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
